ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On The Petition For Spousal Property
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On The Petition For Spousal Property
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Continued To Sep-29-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Motion To Reopen Case
Off Calendar Aug-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Wong for Winola Dere Chu (Petitioner).

Mr. Wong stated that he did not receive the Examiner's notes. The Court granted the Motion To Re-open the case on the Petition For Spousal Property with a new hearing date of September 15, 2009. Counsel was directed to send notice to the two adult children, Michael Chu and Collin Chu, and to the alternate executors, Virgina Lee and Irene Bing. Counsel is to serve the Notice Of Hearing and file a proof of serivce of the Notice Of Hearing by August 12, 2009. Mr. Wong was also directed to speak to the Examiner to confirm that the contact information on file was accurate. The Court will prepare the order granting the motion.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
